name: Smilegate STOVE
description: STOVE Indie developer portal — login, achievements, leaderboards and store APIs for PC/mobile games.

seo.title: Smilegate STOVE — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: Smilegate STOVE: STOVE Indie developer portal — login, achievements, leaderboards and store APIs for PC/mobile games.

when_to_use: PC and mobile game login, achievements, and store SDK
Indie game developer portal for Korean market distribution
Achievements and leaderboard APIs for Smilegate-published games
Cross-platform player identity for games on STOVE platform
Social and community features for Korean indie game launches

pros: Works for PC and mobile games
review.verdict: Useful Korean indie portal with basic BaaS features, largely irrelevant outside Korea.
review.best_for: Korean indie game developers wanting local distribution and basic backend in one place
review.not_for: Global game releases or studios needing deep live-ops and analytics tooling
